assessments.title: Quiz: AnnieCannons New Student Information Quiz

questions.question_text: What is the latest time you can log into Zoom before being marked tardy?

choices.text: At the scheduled start time: 8:45 PST/11:45 EST
Up to 10 minutes after start time
By the end of Block A
We don't track attendance

questions.question_text: If you are going to be late or absent, what should you do?

choices.text: Post in the class OOO channel
Message a classmate and ask them to tell the instructor
Do nothing—life happens
Announce to the class when you arrive what happened

questions.question_text: What should you do if you're stuck on an assignment for more than 10 minutes?

choices.text: Post in the help channel or ask your instructor. It's totally ok to need a second pair of eyes, it happens to all developers!
Keep trying silently until class ends
Ask Ai to do your work
Move on to a different assignment or take a social media break

questions.question_text: When is it required that you come to Focus Friday?

choices.text: When you have missing or incomplete assignments
When you want to ask how a piece of your code is working
When you want to watch other people debug together in the collab rooms (as long as you don't distract from the work)
When you want to come code in community with your peers.

questions.question_text: In order to be considered present in class, you must

choices.text: Have your camera on, be at your laptop, and be in the upright position
It's ok to turn your camera off if you have a headache
It's ok to run a quick errand if you bring your laptop
Its ok to use your phone if you're on the train and there is no Wi-Fi

questions.question_text: What’s the best way to show professionalism in the ITP program?

choices.text: Always being on camera and actively participating, and working towards your goals during lab
Helping your peers before asking for help yourself
Starting personal small talk on a regular basis in breakouts during lab
Doing other work during lectures, and then wanting the instructor to re-teach the lesson to you

questions.question_text: Which of the following would be appropriate to post in the help channel?

choices.text: “I’m struggling to figure out why my if/else isn’t running—here’s my code. I have tried changing the variable on line 9, but it didn't work”
“I have a bug in my assignment”
Just send a screenshot, no explanation needed
“I can't do my homework”
